title: Needs & Wants Walrus
short_description: Wally the walrus has a wallet and a shopping list. Buy every NEED first, then spend leftover coins on WANTS — without busting the budget.
description: Wally the walrus is off to the shops with a set number of coins, and the golden rule of money is: needs before wants. Look over the shelf — food, water, a warm coat and medicine are needs you can't skip, while candy, toys and games are lovely wants — then fill the cart so every need is covered and you never spend more than the wallet holds. It teaches foundational financial literacy: telling needs from wants, prioritising, and keeping to a budget. Grade bands ramp from three items and small budgets, to fuller shelves, to trickier shopping where wants tempt you over the limit. Covering all the needs on budget and building streaks earns bonus points. A free online needs-versus-wants and budgeting money game for kids in grades 1–5, feeding your score and GP on OnlyGrins.
controls: Mouse / tap items to add them to the cart, then Checkout.
